howItWorks.intro: This forex pip calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Pip Value = Pip Size × Lot Size × 100,000 / Price
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.question: What is a pip in forex?
faq.answer: A pip is the smallest standard price movement in a currency pair. For most pairs it is 0.0001; for JPY pairs it is 0.01.

faq.question: How much is a pip worth?
faq.answer: For a standard lot (100,000 units) on EUR/USD, one pip is approximately $10. Mini lots are $1 per pip, micro lots are $0.10.
